description_long: A rustic loaf of bread sits on a rectangular wooden cutting board, accompanied by a wedge of semi-hard cheese with an orange rind and several thin cheese slices. The bread has a round, domed shape with a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy interior, visible where it has been cut. The cheese appears to be a type of washed-rind or coated cheese, with a creamy white interior and a distinct orange outer layer. The cutting board has a natural wood grain pattern and a smooth, flat surface. The overall presentation suggests a simple, artisanal snack or meal, suitable for sharing in an outdoor or urban picnic setting.
description: A round, rustic loaf of bread and a wedge of orange-rinded cheese rest on a wooden cutting board, with several cheese slices arranged nearby. The bread has a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy interior.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cut face of the bread loaf, the wedge of cheese, and several cheese slices neatly arranged on the wooden board.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the bread loaf and the cheese wedge, with the cheese slices fanned out in front.
description_view_2: The back view displays the rounded, scored top of the bread loaf, with the cheese wedge and slices partially obscured behind it.
description_view_3: This angle shows the bread loaf from the opposite side, with the cut face and a single bread slice visible, and the cheese wedge standing upright.
attribute_crust_pattern: The bread's crust is golden-brown with a rustic, slightly rough texture and visible scoring marks on the top, giving it a traditional, artisanal appearance.
